topic: My router logs show my dead father's laptop connecting to my network every night
title: My Router Logs Show My Dead Father's Laptop Connecting Every Night at Three AM | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The device name was my father's laptop. He died three years ago.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a laptop screen showing a router admin panel with a device list, one entry highlighted showing a device name with a familiar label, the connection timestamp showing three AM, dim desk lamp, late night, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I moved into his house after he passed. Kept the same router.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a quiet living room at dusk, older furniture, a router with indicator lights on a shelf near the TV, no one visible, the room dim and still, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: His laptop was in a box in the closet. Screen cracked. Dead battery.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an old laptop partially visible inside a cardboard box on a closet shelf, the screen cracked across one corner, a power cable coiled beside it, the closet dim, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The router logs flagged an unknown connection. Three fourteen AM. Last Thursday.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a laptop screen showing a router admin log table, one row highlighted showing a connection event in the early morning hours, the device identifier column showing a familiar name, dark room behind the screen, vertical 9:16 framing

close shot of a laptop screen zoomed into a single row of a network log table, a device name visible in one column, the text clear against the white background, desk lamp the only light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I went to the closet. Laptop still in the box. Still dead.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of the same cardboard box open on the closet shelf, the old laptop inside undisturbed, the cracked screen visible, no charging cable plugged in, closet light on, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I checked the logs going back six months.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a laptop screen showing a router admin log filtered to show historical entries, a long scrollable list of connection events, a hand on the mouse scrolling through the data, late night, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Same device. Same name. Every night between two and four AM.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a laptop screen showing a filtered network log with multiple rows highlighted, each row sharing the same device name and timestamps in the two AM to four AM range across different dates, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I changed the router password and watched the logs.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a home office at night, a person seated at a desk facing a laptop screen showing the router admin panel, the router visible on a shelf nearby with its lights blinking, no other light source, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Three nineteen AM. His device connected again. Used the new password.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a laptop screen showing a real-time network device list with a new entry appearing, the device name matching the previous entries, the connection time showing in the corner of the screen, the room reflected dark in the screen, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I went back to the closet.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a hallway at night, a figure walking toward an open closet door at the far end, the closet light spilling into the dark hall, the rest of the house dark on either side, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The laptop was still dead. Still in the box. The charging cable was warm.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand resting on a coiled charging cable inside a cardboard box on a closet shelf, the cable visibly undisturbed but the hand pressed flat against it, the cracked laptop screen visible beside it, closet light overhead, vertical 9:16 framing
